title: Eva Store pilots popularity survey
wikitext:
[]: Eva Store pilots popularity survey             Quote Post by Joseki » Wed Feb 06, 2019 10:16 am The Eva Store asked people to vote their favorite pilot [each movie had its own entries], and this were the results. Asuka (Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance): 2,187 votes Kaworu (Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo): 1,871 votes Rei (Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance): 252 votes Asuka (Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo) Shinji (Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance) Rei (Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone) Kaworu (Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance) Shinji (Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone) Mari ( Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance) Mari (Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo) Shinji (Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo) Rei (Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo) Kaworu (Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone) Asuka in 2.0 and Kaworu in 3.0 dominates.

[]: Re: Eva Store pilots popularity survey             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Feb 06, 2019 12:02 pm Asuka as Best Girl confirmed! EDIT: How Space Pirate Asuka specifically isn't also Best Girl is beyond me.

[]: Re: Eva Store pilots popularity survey             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Feb 06, 2019 5:00 pm Asuka best character.

[]: Re: Eva Store pilots popularity survey             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Sat Feb 09, 2019 7:20 pm ^ Which makes her best girl

[]: Re: Eva Store pilots popularity survey             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Feb 09, 2019 7:40 pm It's so weird to break up the list like this. I can see giving Rei Q her own slot, but otherwise, I don't see the point in (for example) breaking Kaworu up into three slots when he had only 1-2 lines total in 1.0 and 2.0.

[]: Re: Eva Store pilots popularity survey             Quote Post by Settie » Sat Feb 09, 2019 9:43 pm Wow i'm surprised by how far behind poka poka Rei is behind #2 & 1. I thought that version of Rei was quite popular.

[]: Re: Eva Store pilots popularity survey             Quote Post by Joseki » Sun Feb 10, 2019 6:28 am The Eva Monkey wrote: It's so weird to break up the list like this. I can see giving Rei Q her own slot, but otherwise, I don't see the point in (for example) breaking Kaworu up into three slots when he had only 1-2 lines total in 1.0 and 2.0.

[]: Re: Eva Store pilots popularity survey             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Sun Feb 10, 2019 11:27 am ^ Sounds like Asuka's gonna have a lot of more merch

[]: Re: Eva Store pilots popularity survey             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Mon Feb 11, 2019 4:14 pm Oh my god how perfect, not even Japanese audiences care about Mari

[]: Re: Eva Store pilots popularity survey             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Mon Feb 11, 2019 5:24 pm AdamMalkovitch wrote: Oh my god how perfect, not even Japanese audiences care about Mari :D

[]: Re: Eva Store pilots popularity survey             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Thu Feb 14, 2019 9:02 pm ^ Plus each character was broken out by film appearance, so we don't know if the overall totals would have changed if the characters were combined, though I assume to top spot wouldn't change all that much, second and third place might.
